project.name: TILDA - Bike Routes
project.description: TILDA processes bicycle route relations from OpenStreetMap data for cycling network planning and visualization.

tags.description: Entry condition identifying route relations for bicycle route processing.
Entry condition identifying bicycle routes for cycling network planning.
Route distance metadata used for bicycle route planning and display.
Classifies route as local cycle network for network level categorization.
Classifies route as regional cycle network for network level categorization.
Classifies route as national cycle network for network level categorization.
Classifies route as international cycle network for network level categorization.
Identifies Radschnellverbindungen (cycle highways) for high-quality route classification.
Indicates route is a round trip for route geometry and display logic.
Indicates route is not a round trip for route geometry and display logic.
Classifies route as part of a node-based cycle network.
Classifies route as part of a basic cycle network.
Cycle network key for route identification and network attribution.
Route symbol description for map display and route identification.
Route description used for cycling network planning context.
German route description for localized display and planning.
Route colour for map display and route visualization.
Route name used for display and bicycle route identification.
Route reference number for display and route identification.
